subject: Human Resources
title: HR Technology and HRIS
description: One-minute skill: HR Technology and HRIS.

hook.text: A company tracks employee data in spreadsheets. An update error pays 200 people the wrong amount.

buildup.text: HRIS (Human Resource Information Systems) centralize employee data, payroll, benefits, and compliance in one platform.

discovery.text: Modern HRIS platforms automate onboarding, time tracking, performance reviews, and reporting.

twist.text: Technology doesn't replace HR judgment—it frees HR professionals from admin work to focus on people.

climax.text: Companies using HRIS spend 40% less time on administrative tasks and make fewer costly errors.

punchline.text: Good HR tech handles the paperwork. Great HR handles the people.

quiz.question: What is the primary benefit of HRIS?
options: Centralizing data and reducing administrative burden
